326948-2025:a49eb03a4c39.description_en: The Contracting Authority hereby invites you to submit a Request for Participation in tendering procedure no. 22094003 for the design and delivery of 28 + 12 optional military trailers specifically for Role 1 and Role 2. 245184-2024:93713d8b2d7a.description_en: Belgium Defence seeks to procure 780 military trailers across six types: 54 lightweight Type 1 trailers (750 kg capacity), 366 Type 2 cargo trailers (5-tonne capacity), 8 Type 3 tipper trailers (5-tonne capacity) for the Construction Engineers, 124 Type 4 ramp trailers (5-tonne capacity) for transporting light equipment, 204 Type 5 trailers for ISO 20ft container transport, and 24 Type 6 heavy-duty trailers (16-tonne capacity) for transporting Construction Engineer heavy equipment. 726774-2024:b51472939797.description_en: This Danish Defence tender is divided into two lots covering the supply, maintenance, and spare parts for various tractors, trailers, and ground maintenance machinery. **Lot 1** covers tractors of varying weight classes (light FLV, light, light+, medium, and heavy variants) alongside specialized trailers including a 24-tonne block wagon, 16-tonne hook-lift wagon, contractor wagon, and standard trailer; it also includes maintenance of the Defence's existing legacy fleet of equivalent machines. **Lot 2** covers garden and grounds maintenance equipment including mini tractors, garden tractors, front-mounted rotary mowers, zero-turn mowers, multi-machines, implement carriers, hot water systems, arm mowers, slope mowers, and 1-tonne and 2-tonne utility wagons, again including maintenance of the existing legacy fleet. 530666-2024:465b77f91c52.description_en: This tender covers two separate lots for trailers under 3,500 kg. 345761-2025:5d7db5a97a7f.description_en: Onderhavige aanbesteding betreft een behoefte vanuit de Koninklijke Marine (CZSK) voor de vervanging van 27 boottrailers en een uitbreiding van het aantal boottrailers met 12 stuks. 39 boottrailers in totaal. Preventief en correctief onderhoud worden uitgevoerd binnen een andere overeenkomst van Aanbestedende dienst. Het betreft boottrailers voor het vervoer van boten van CZSK. Het gaat om diverse typen boottrailers die worden ingezet voor het vervoer van diverse type rubberboten over land. Rubberboten met harde V bodem, rubberboten met zachte bodem en met inbouw of buitenboord motor.

Combined, the procurement encompasses a potential total of up to 9,700 trailer units across both variants.

719142-2025:82cf88edb8e5.description_en: The German armed forces are seeking a 7-year framework agreement for the manufacture and delivery of up to 480 two-wheeled, 1-tonne trailers (Anh 2 Rad 1t gl le) including associated accessories and equipment. Additional deliverables include cataloguing data, a parts list, hazard assessment, manufacturing and design documentation (drawing sets, transport/loading documentation, materials list), and miscellaneous documents such as a product safety declaration and obsolescence management plan. The contractor will also be required to provide services including initial operator/maintainer training.

77247-2026:432f16b5b67a.description_en: Acquisition of militarized, road-homologated off-road motorcycles across three engine displacement categories: 120–125 cc, 245–280 cc, and 300–380 cc. 212474-2026:82cf88edb8e5.description_en: The German Bundeswehr is seeking a 7-year framework agreement for the manufacture and delivery of up to 480 two-wheeled, 1-tonne general-purpose light military trailers, including associated accessories and equipment. Additional deliverables include cataloguing data, a parts list, hazard assessment, production and engineering documentation (drawing sets, transport/loading documentation, materials lists), and other required documents such as a product safety declaration and obsolescence management plan. 673480-2024:981273eb5662.description_en: Eén van de taken van het Logistiek Centrum Woensdrecht (LCW) is het transporteren van vliegende wapensystemen, af te stoten vliegtuigen, te plaatsen poortwachters en transport van gecrashte vliegtuigen of onderdelen daarvan. De Bergingsvoertuigen die daarvoor gebruikt worden stammen uit 1978 en zijn ver over de technische en economische levensduur. Daarom heeft het LCW behoefte aan een nieuw bergingsvoertuig / bergingscombinatie. Vanwege de werkwijze van de bergingsdienst CLSK dient het voertuig / de combinatie voorzien te zijn van een autolaadkraan en bestuurd / gereden te kunnen worden door 1 persoon. Daarbij moet het voertuig / de combinatie de gestelde (deels gedemonteerde) militaire vliegtuigen en helicopters kunnen vervoeren. Opsplitsen van de functionaliteiten in meerdere zelfstandige voertuigen / eenheden past niet in de werkwijze van de bergingsdienst. Onderhavige aanbesteding betreft een heraanbesteding. De Aanbestedende dienst heeft reeds eerder een aanbestedingsprocedure (een Europese openbare aanbesteding) gehouden voor onderhavige opdracht. Die aanbesteding is stopgezet en ingetrokken, omdat het bergingsvoertuig niet juist is uitgevraagd. Door de behoefte te specificeren in twee afzonderlijke Programma’s van Eisen, te weten ‘PVE_VAU_TRK 10x4 met autolaadkraan 165tm v1.0’ en ‘PVE_oplegger 200KN diepbed dieplader v1.0’, is de noodzakelijke onderlinge samenhang tussen deze Programma’s van Eisen niet duidelijk gemaakt.

UK-tender_285861/998388:490d2580ee5a.description_en:
Heavy Technical Trailer Capability - Industry Engagement
The aim of this engagement is to sound the market and understand industry appetite and possible opportunities to meet a Heavy Technical Trailer capability.  The Army requires a family of trailers to be towed behind mainly armoured platforms.  These trailers will initially carry the PYTHON mine clearance system; power packs for CHALLENGER/AJAX/BOXER/WR variants and AS90; other engines and main assemblies; logistic supplies potentially including engineer logistic materiel, fuel and ammunition.  The trailers will be towed behind TROJAN, TERRIER, CRARRV, WR512/513, AJAX Apollo, BOXER, MAN SV 15 t and SV(R).  
The family of trailers will be produced with as much commonality as possible, able to interoperate across the fleet of towing platforms and feature the following requirements:
-	Mobility commensurate with the towing platforms cross country and on road, laden and unladen.
-	PYTHON trailers to enable 2 or 3 trailers behind one platform with uncoupling under armour
-	Appropriate stowage.
-	Load capacity up to c7t (CR3/T2 power pack likely to be the heaviest payload)
-	GVA compliant.
-	Brake testing solution and road legislation compliance.
Areas we seek input from include:
-	Opportunities for variable geometry hitches and connections.
-	Opportunity for variable geometry axles.
-	Braking solutions - likely to be ABS air brakes utilising on-board trailer mounted compressor and primarily powered electrically from towing platform with an option of air hoses for wheeled vehicle movements.
-	Appetite for procurement in line with the Land Industrial Strategy to enable a rapid procurement between 2023-26.
-	Transformational approach to an autonomous/remote controlled/RF tethered self-powered, non physically connected support platform.
The expected fleet size is c120 with a likely life span of 20 years.  
This day will start with a presentation from the programme SRO outlining our requirements followed by the opportunity for 15 minute 1 to 1 discussions with the SRO and his team.  Lunch will be provided.  The engagement will be held on 3 Nov 21 at Newcome Hall in Larkhill.  Pre-registration to attend the event and discussion is required.
Registration should be sent to ArmyFutures-CSS-Prog@mod.gov.uk by 26 Oct 21.  Requests for 1 to 1 discussions should be included in the response.

AU-CN4104798:a5b2dd2abf61.description_en: This tender seeks qualified contractors to provide repair and maintenance services for military vehicles on behalf of the Australian Defence Force. The scope covers mechanical, electrical, and structural repairs across a range of military vehicle types and platforms. Contractors must demonstrate the capability to service and restore defence vehicles to operational readiness standards. The procurement is based in Australia and targets suppliers with relevant defence industry experience and appropriate workshop facilities.

AU-CN4104791:a5b2dd2abf61.description_en: This tender seeks contractors to provide repair and maintenance services for military vehicles on behalf of the Australian Defence Force. The scope likely encompasses mechanical, electrical, and structural repairs across a range of military vehicle platforms operated by the Australian Army or other defence branches. Contractors would be expected to have the capability, facilities, and qualified personnel to service and restore military-grade vehicles to operational readiness. No further technical specifications regarding specific vehicle types, quantities, or repair categories were provided in the original description.

AU-CN4104783:a5b2dd2abf61.description_en: This tender seeks qualified contractors to provide repair and maintenance services for military vehicles on behalf of the Australian Defence Force. The scope covers mechanical, electrical, and structural repairs across a range of defence vehicle platforms. Contractors must demonstrate the capability to service and restore military-grade vehicles to operational standards. The procurement is issued under Australian defence acquisition guidelines and is open to suitably experienced and certified service providers.

AU-CN4104768:a5b2dd2abf61.description_en: This tender seeks contractors to provide repair and maintenance services for military vehicles on behalf of the Australian Defence Force. The scope likely encompasses mechanical, electrical, and structural repairs across a range of military vehicle platforms operated by the Australian Army or other defence branches. Contractors would be expected to have the necessary technical expertise, facilities, and security clearances to work on defence assets. Further technical specifications regarding specific vehicle types, quantities, and service requirements would be detailed in the full tender documentation.

326948-2025:a49eb03a4c39:haiku-clean.description_en: The Netherlands Ministry of Defence seeks to procure 40 military medical trailers (28 firm + 12 optional units) designed to transport Lightweight Highly Mobile Infrastructure (LHMI) systems and generators in support of Role 1 and Role 2 field medical operations. The trailers will be delivered through a Restricted Procedure under the Dutch Defence and Security Procurement Act, with a 15-year maintenance and support contract included. Specific technical specifications regarding dimensions, payload capacity, and detailed operational capabilities were not disclosed in the invitation text.

CA-cb-709-75404492:dcadf121c8a7:haiku-cl.description_en: The Department of National Defence is procuring vehicular equipment components for mobile kitchen trailers, specifically levelling jack assemblies (left-front-and-right-rear and right-front variants) with a total quantity of 10 units. Delivery is requested to two locations: 25 CFSD in Montreal, Quebec and Edmonton, Alberta by December 7, 2026. The components are replacement/maintenance parts for existing mobile kitchen trailer equipment operated by Canadian Armed Forces.

CA-WS4863804357-Doc5106881775:9c980bd4eb.description_en: Canada's Department of National Defence is seeking a Regional Individual Standing Offer (RISO) for highway tractor rentals through solicitation W0127-24P031. The procurement covers provision of labour, transportation, materials, tools, equipment, and supervision necessary to supply highway tractors without operators. Specific details regarding quantity, delivery locations, and technical specifications are not fully provided in the available tender excerpt.

CA-cb-441-89367036:2ac0ec523d84:haiku-cl.description_en: The Department of National Defence is procuring spare manual control levers for armament loaders (Part No. 5030707, NCAGE 0848B or equivalent), with a quantity of at least 3 units required. Delivery is requested to two Canadian Forces Supply Depots: 25 CFSD Montreal, Quebec and 7 CFSD Edmonton, Alberta, with expedited delivery timelines. These are replacement components for existing military equipment requiring immediate replenishment of critical spare parts.

345761-2025:5d7db5a97a7f:haiku-clean.description_en: The Royal Netherlands Navy (CZSK) is procuring 39 boat trailers for transporting various types of rubber boats over land, with an option for up to 15 additional trailers. The trailers must accommodate different rubber boat configurations including hard V-bottom boats, soft-bottom boats, and vessels equipped with either inboard or outboard motors. This is a purchase-only contract; maintenance will be handled under a separate agreement, though standard manufacturer warranties apply.

207812-2024:76c91e924ff7:haiku-clean.description_en: The Irish Department of Defence (Defence Forces) is procuring two semi-trailer aircraft refuelling units: Lot 1 comprises one 25,000-litre capacity trailer and Lot 2 comprises one 36,000-litre capacity trailer. These trailers will support the Air Corps fixed and rotary wing fleet operations within Ireland. Each lot will be awarded as a separate contract, with delivery required to support Defence Forces operational requirements.

493986-2024:715313a67cdc:haiku-clean.description_en: Italy is procuring 30 multifunctional engineer equipment units (plus 15 optional) mounted on two-axle trailers at €81,486 per unit, and 62 field lighting towers (plus 49 optional) on two-axle trailers at €29,400 per unit. Both procurements will be awarded on a lowest-price basis and delivered in three installments over 200, 350, and 700 days respectively from contract start. No specific technical specifications regarding dimensions, payload capacity, or detailed capabilities are provided in the tender text.

254420-2025:715313a67cdc:haiku-clean.description_en: Italy is procuring 30 multifunctional engineering equipment units on two-axle trailers (plus 15 optional) at €81,486 per unit, and 62 field lighting towers on two-axle trailers (plus 49 optional) at €29,400 per unit. Delivery will occur in three installments with preparation and conformity verification timelines of 200 days (batch 1), 350 days (batch 2), and 700 days (batch 3) from contract commencement. Both procurements are awarded on lowest-price criteria due to standardized, low-technology specifications. No specific delivery location is identified in the tender.

152406-2025:a7d7eb55f9e0:haiku-clean.description_en: The Irish Department of Defence (Defence Forces) is procuring heavy haulage transport equipment comprising two new 6x4 double-drive articulated trucks (Lot 1), one 3-axle low-bed trailer with payload capacity exceeding 46,000 kg (Lot 2), and one 4-axle semi low-bed trailer with payload capacity exceeding 46,000 kg (Lot 3). The successful tenderer for Lot 1 must accept two used Mercedes Actros 2643 LS trucks (including one equipped with a Hiab crane) as trade-in credit against the new truck purchases. Each lot will result in a separate contract, with delivery to the Department of Defence in Ireland.

140259-2025:d01c5b204f13:haiku-clean.description_en: The Norwegian Armed Forces is establishing a national framework agreement for the purchase and maintenance of civilian support trailers, including goods trailers, hangers, boat trailers, canoe trailers, and ATV hangers. The contract encompasses procurement of new trailers, spare parts, extra equipment, and both corrective and preventive annual maintenance services. Maintenance and spare parts support must be offered across all trailer manufacturers for both existing trailers and those acquired under this framework agreement. Specific quantities, dimensions, payload capacities, and delivery locations are not detailed in this notice.

782671-2023:65ea3b35fe73:haiku-clean.description_en: The Norwegian Armed Forces seeks a national framework agreement for the purchase and maintenance of various trailers, including goods trailers, hangers, boat trailers, canoe trailers, and ATV hangers. The contract encompasses procurement of new trailers, spare parts, and equipment, along with corrective and preventive annual maintenance services applicable to both existing trailers and those acquired under the agreement. Maintenance and spare parts support must be offered across all trailer manufacturers represented in the existing fleet and future procurements. No specific quantities or technical specifications (dimensions, payload) are detailed in the available tender text.

673480-2024:981273eb5662:haiku-clean.description_en: The Netherlands Ministry of Defence, through the Logistics Centre Woensdrecht (LCW), is procuring one recovery vehicle with integrated auto-loader crane and one semi-trailer to transport military aircraft, helicopters, and crashed aircraft components. The vehicle must be operable by a single operator and capable of transporting partially disassembled military fixed-wing and rotary-wing aircraft. The requirements are specified across two integrated specifications: a 10x4 truck with 165-tonne auto-loader crane and a 200kN deep-bed semi-trailer, with emphasis on functional integration between both units for operational compatibility with the CLSK recovery service.

602000-2024:e1f59cdc6bd8:haiku-clean.description_en: Denmark is procuring All-Terrain Vehicles (ATVs) and associated cargo trailers across two lots: LOT 1 includes 32 MIL Spec ATVs with high payload capacity and 20 cargo trailers for initial delivery; LOT 2 comprises spare and wear parts, a four-day mechanic training course for 4 mechanics and 2 operators, an initial fleet spare parts package, and 32 one-year service kits for the MIL Spec ATVs. The agreement also covers procurement of two additional COTS ATV variants—one with high payload and one with low payload capacity—though specific quantities for these types are not detailed in the initial buy. No specific delivery location or detailed dimensional/payload specifications are provided in the source text.

252675-2024:d70d2f99aafe:haiku-clean.description_en: Romania is procuring 6 field kitchen assemblies (containers and tent configurations) with minimum quantities of 1 unit and maximum of 6 units per contract, valued between 4.2–25.2 million lei. The procurement specifies minimum technical requirements detailed in the tender's technical specifications annex, with flexibility in contract quantities ranging from 1–2 units depending on the contracting structure. No specific delivery location or detailed dimensional specifications are provided in this summary text.

151800-2025:d70d2f99aafe:haiku-clean.description_en: Romania is procuring 6 field kitchen assemblies (containers and tent configurations) with minimum quantities of 1 unit and maximum of 6 units per contract. The procurement specifies a budget range of 4.2–25.2 million lei, with detailed technical specifications provided in the tender documentation annex. The kitchens are intended for mobile field deployment and must meet minimum technical requirements outlined in the specification sheets.

103251-2026:d70d2f99aafe:haiku-clean.description_en: Romania is procuring field kitchen assemblies (container and tent-based configurations) in quantities ranging from 1 to 6 complete units, with an estimated contract value between 4.2 and 25.2 million lei. The procurement specifies minimum technical requirements detailed in the tender specifications annex, with flexible quantity and pricing options available depending on the contracting approach. Delivery location and detailed dimensional specifications are referenced in the attached technical specification documents.

UK-tender_285861/998388:b92fda9ede62:hai.description_en: The UK Ministry of Defence (Army) seeks industry input on the design and procurement of approximately 120 heavy technical trailers with a 20-year lifespan, to be towed behind armoured platforms including TROJAN, TERRIER, BOXER, and AJAX. The trailers must accommodate payloads up to 7 tonnes (primarily CR3/T2 power packs), support cross-country and on-road mobility, feature GVW compliance and air brake systems with electrical power from towing platforms, and enable PYTHON mine-clearance systems to operate in multi-trailer configurations with under-armour uncoupling capability. The procurement is planned for 2023–26 under the Land Industrial Strategy, with delivery locations across UK Army operational sites.

UK-RQ0000031667:b01302125f33:haiku-clean.description_en: RTO Group seeks to procure one large replacement tractor and one heavy-duty flat-bed trailer equipped with integrated ISO container twist-locks for a long-term operational lifespan exceeding 10 years. The procurement is mandatory to include trade-in of existing tractor and trailer equipment as part of the deal. No specific delivery location, payload capacity, or dimensional specifications are provided in the tender documentation. Interested suppliers must register on the Defence Sourcing Portal and submit responses to the outlined requirements.

UK-tender_336462/1140912:f4fee5f4e538:ha.description_en: The UK Ministry of Defence is procuring a fuel delivery support system comprising one 960-litre fuel trailer (capacity <1000L/1m³) and aviation fuel (AVGAS 100LL) for Strathclyde and Glasgow University Air Squadron (UGSAS) based at Glasgow. The requirement supports three permanently based Grob Tutor 115E aircraft, with an annual fuel uplift requirement of up to 1,100 litres plus surge capacity. The supplier must provide both the mobile fuel trailer and ongoing AVGAS supply in support of the university air squadron's flying operations.

CA-cb-858-22734399:815625016e32:haiku-cl.description_en: The Department of National Defence is procuring one (1) Fat Truck® Hauler Trailer for supply and delivery. Specific details regarding dimensions, payload capacity, and technical specifications are not provided in the available tender text. The delivery location has not been specified in the excerpt provided.

CA-cb-758-37458917:179b33d1cf01:haiku-cl.description_en: The Department of National Defence is procuring repair and overhaul services for Heavy Logistics Vehicle Wheeled (HLVW) engines, their containers, and associated components to return them to fully serviceable condition. Services include handling, disassembling, cleaning, inspecting, repairing, reassembling, testing, and overhauling, with a three-year contract period from the date of award. No specific quantity, delivery location, or technical specifications are provided in the available tender text.

CA-cb-638-26291550:842a4b51219a:haiku-cl.description_en: The Department of National Defence is procuring 50 enclosed trailers in various configurations (4, 6, 8, 11, 12, 13, and 15) under Supply Arrangement E60HP-19TRLR/HP. Delivery is required within 120 days of order receipt. This solicitation is restricted to suppliers already holding a valid Supply Arrangement under RFSA E60HP-19.

CA-cb-479-92541306:fd72c095d6a0:haiku-cl.description_en:
# NISO - Body Maintenance and Corrosion Control

The Department of National Defence seeks to establish up to three (3) National Individual Standing Offers (NISOs) for corrosion control and body maintenance services on DND-owned vehicles and trailers across all support bases throughout Canada. Services will be delivered in accordance with a technical statement of work dated 2024-10-30 and will cover multiple regions including the Maritimes. The procurement establishes framework agreements for preventative and corrective maintenance to extend vehicle asset life and maintain operational readiness across the Canadian defence fleet.

CA-cb-354-91077006:32734296faea:haiku-cl.description_en: The Department of National Defence is procuring 25 cargo trailers for delivery to Canadian Forces Bases at Gagetown, Valcartier, Kingston, Suffield, and Edmonton, with delivery required within 180 days of contract award. The procurement is restricted to suppliers holding a Supply Arrangement under RFSA E60HP-24CARG.

CA-cb-903-54122545:09da1a85af6b:haiku-cl.description_en: The Department of National Defence is procuring spare parts for the Heavy Logistics Vehicle Wheeled (HLVW), specifically a drag link-tie rod assembly (Part No. 040360025606). Delivery is required to Canadian Forces Supply Depots in Montreal and Edmonton within 90 days of contract award.

CA-cb-16-29327250:1d4660533d27:haiku-cle.description_en: The Department of National Defence is procuring three (3) Zodiac Hurricane 540 trailer boats for delivery to Canadian Forces Base Gagetown and Canadian Forces Base Bagotville within 120 days of contract award. The Zodiac Hurricane 540 is a rigid inflatable boat designed for rapid deployment and tactical maritime operations.

CA-cb-485-53016575:6a1a87f73b83:haiku-cl.description_en: The Department of National Defence is procuring spare parts for BV 206 vehicles, including a nonmetallic hose assembly (Part No. 3536321-804, qty 4) and a rubber seal (Part No. 4536602-001). Delivery is required to 7 Canadian Forces Supply Depot in Edmonton, Alberta by November 21, 2025.

CA-cb-554-73415459:6cea2bab9f2b:haiku-cl.description_en: The Department of National Defence is procuring two (2) Zodiac Hurricane Mk5 trailer boats for delivery to Canadian Forces Base Gagetown within 120 days of contract award. The Zodiac Hurricane Mk5 is a rigid hull inflatable boat (RHIB) configuration designed for military and maritime operations.

CA-cb-359-74516142:ea7eda4c5cd0:haiku-cl.description_en: The Department of National Defence is procuring vehicular equipment components, including fluid filters and filter elements, for delivery to two Canadian Forces Supply Depots: 25 CFSD in Montreal, Quebec and 7 CFSD in Edmonton, Alberta by December 1, 2025. The procurement includes at least 15 units of a fluid filter (Part No. 17001-3418) and filter element components (Part No. 32-WS-01) to support vehicle maintenance operations across both locations.

CA-cb-564-33891857:72a3153829ca:haiku-cl.description_en: The Department of National Defence is procuring Light Support Vehicles (Wheeled) for delivery to 25 Canadian Forces Station Montreal and 7 Canadian Forces Station Edmonton within 90 days of contract award. The procurement includes torque wrench adapters and additional components, with specific quantities and delivery requirements to the two Canadian military installations.

CA-cb-644-62331342:c5f015faa51e:haiku-cl.description_en: The Department of National Defence is procuring one Zodiac Hurricane 472 trailer boat for delivery to Canadian Forces Base Gagetown, with a required delivery timeframe of 120 days following contract award.

CA-cb-429-10910023:268db31745bc:haiku-cl.description_en: The Department of National Defence (DND) is procuring one (1) trailer boat compatible with the Zodiac Mk3 for delivery to Canadian Forces Base Gagetown. The delivery is required within 120 days of contract award. No additional specifications regarding dimensions, payload, or capabilities are provided in the available tender text.

CA-cb-486-33159154:4a66adab25fa:haiku-cl.description_en: The Department of National Defence is procuring nineteen (19) Zodiac Hurricane RIB trailer boats for delivery to eight Canadian Forces Bases located in Gagetown, Bagotville, Toronto, Chiliwack, Valcartier, Halifax, Kingston, and Montréal. FR-22-16243:6a39a8716983.description_en: This French defence tender covers road transport services for petroleum/fuel products carried in tanker trucks between defence and security zones across metropolitan France, including Corsica. The scope encompasses inter-zone logistics support for fuel distribution, likely serving military installations, depots, and operational units requiring reliable hydrocarbon supply chains. The contract is structured as a services market, indicating a framework or scheduled transport arrangement rather than a one-off procurement.

The service encompasses all of mainland France and Corsica, indicating a nationwide logistics requirement in support of defence and security operations. The contract is structured as a service agreement focused on tanker road haulage capability to maintain fuel supply chains across French defence zones.

FR-21-47488:c03187076331.description_en: France is seeking to acquire an all-terrain mobile ground robot with remote control capabilities, along with a dedicated transport trailer and associated technical support services. FR-26-38159:8082751acfb5.description_en: This tender covers the collection and delivery of water for human consumption (EDCH) via tank vessel to the "Ouvrages du Levant - Sémaphore du Titan" site located near Hyères, France. This procurement represents France's effort to integrate renewable energy solutions into military operational support infrastructure.
